description.content: Get insights about parcels
Returns data about parcels as a series, e.g. the number of parcels per day/month/year over a specified period.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Returns data about parcels as buckets. Buckets should be grouped by any category, for example by country.
Returns number of parcels for the last number of days selected.

query.description: (Required) value for the last number of days

description.content: Get insights about products
Returns data about products as a series, e.g. the number of products per day/month/year over a specified period.
Returns data about products as buckets. Buckets should be grouped by any category, for example by country.
Get insights about average transit times per carriers and shipping methods

Retrieves the average transit time of a parcel per carrier.
You can filter the results by origin and destination country, as well as by start and end dates.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

Retrieves the average transit time of a parcel per shipping method and carrier.
You can filter the results by origin and destination country, as well as start and end dates.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Get list of carriers and shipping methods a user ever used

item.name: Retrieve all shipping methods used by user

request.name: Retrieve all shipping methods used by user

description.content: Returns a list of all shipping methods ever used by a user.

item.name: Retrieve all carriers used by user

request.name: Retrieve all carriers used by user

description.content: Returns a list of all carriers ever used by a user.

The Analytics API lets you query for insights about parcels, products and transit times.
